name: mei4_FLEX_motif_paralog_promoters
description: FLEX motif (CTTTCAAAA) paralog promoters bound by Mei4 in S. pombe. Mei4 directs middle-meiotic transcription and also represses Tf2; ~100 promoters across the genome carry FLEX motifs and constitute the dispersed Mei4 regulon. Not a sequence-repeat per se, but a regulatory paralog network with overlapping Tf2 regulation; listed here as the LTR-adjacent regulatory background.
